creator: shurd@FreeBSD.org
text:
The gnome-autogen.sh script included in devel/gnome-common uses a
spectacularly bad method of detecting the automake versions available.  

This results in automake 1.12 not being detected and gnome-autogen.sh failing.

Fix: 

Lines 318-325 need to have automake-1.12 added to them and a 1.12 line needs to be added.
How-To-Repeat: Install gnome-common, run gnome-autogen.sh
